ddls:
CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disciplinary field */,
  "sub_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-area within the discipline */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research project */,
  "pi_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the principal investigator */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost associated with the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the project starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the project is expected to end */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., proposed, ongoing, completed) */,
  "project_summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the project */,
  "funding_status" TEXT /* Status of the funding (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_pi_id FOREIGN KEY ("pi_id") REFERENCES pi_details ("pi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_discipline_id FOREIGN KEY ("discipline_id") REFERENCES disciplines ("discipline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_sub_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_area_id") REFERENCES sub_areas ("sub_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pi_details" (
  "pi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each principal investigator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the principal investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the principal investigator */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the principal investigator is employed */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the principal investigator */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Areas of research interest */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the principal investigator's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated research project */,
  "cost_description" TEXT /* Description of the cost (e.g., materials, personnel) */,
  "cost_amount" REAL /* Amount for the specific cost entry */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the cost (e.g., materials, personnel, equipment) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the cost was incurred */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_costs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_areas" (
  "sub_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-area */,
  "sub_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-area */,
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disciplinary field */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sub-area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_areas_discipline_id FOREIGN KEY ("discipline_id") REFERENCES disciplines ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplines" (
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discipline */,
  "discipline_name" TEXT /* Name of the discipline */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the discipline */,
  "head_of_discipline" TEXT /* Name of the head of the discipline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_collaborations" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated research project */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collaborating researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator in the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration is expected to end */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES pi_details ("pi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated research project */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Name of the funding agency */,
  "amount_funded" REAL /* Total amount funded for the project */,
  "funding_status" TEXT /* Status of the funding (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the funding application was submitted */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the funding was approved */,
  "funding_reference" TEXT /* Reference number or code for the funding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_sources_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)
